{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320035218CFA03C22E1C7C97504"}"},"total":1561},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7181640774768493364","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很棒，没有将现实忽略，给人缓和，不会一直看规则，导致后期看规则会麻木，两个世界交替的情节不会让人感觉太腻，至于女主比较多，能缓解压力嘛，我还是挺喜欢的，跟我看的许多规则不同，它们直接就把现实忽略了，刚回来现实感觉什么没发生就又参加去了，甚至有的回都不回的……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672106130,"group_id":"7143497857264258082","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢小说的学徒，喜欢能有人喜欢我的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2t5mpwVDwn6egB+1p7Cv8GJaqi3ElJPQw3KaMOKDRCP","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/04988b25abec444bb6125188d8c21206~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795744&x-signature=YkkXbxstEYDdc1jEDYnDxj4Bg18%3D","user_id":"1160685007936804","user_name":"零花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1160685007936804","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143497857264258082","book_info":{"abstract":"规则怪谈降临，试炼者需为国闯关，闯关成功，怪谈消失，闯关失败，怪谈降临。
